caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. The background features a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs, a white male mannequin wearing a white t-shirt, and a clothing rack filled with apparel. A logo reading "BORN REALLY TOI" is visible in the bottom right of the frame, and another circular logo is in the bottom left. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains his position, but his facial expression shifts. He begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, then closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly, and finally looks off to his left with a skeptical or contemplative look on his face.
